creator: lapo@lapo.it
text:
Jack Lloyd (upstream) told me that botan cross-version compatibility
gives very little assurances (due to C++ ABI limitations and not Botan's
code, AFAIK) so it's probably wrong to put use a botan.so.0 name and the
botan-1.6.5.so we currently use is a better fit (though botan-config
seems to suggest the name without version number instead).
I'm not so sure about this issue, so I leave this comment to rely on
(hopefully more complete) understanding of others ;)

Still, I don't know how to LIB_DEPEND on this port from the
devel/monotone 0.43 I'm preparing if the digit is not added.
Maybe using both forms together? e.g. botan-1.6.5.so.0
